hooks.command: powershell -Command "$content = Get-Content docs\ROADMAP.md -Raw; $match = $content -match '(?s)\*\*Current phase:\*\*\s*Phase\s+(\d+)'; if ($match) { $phase = [int]$matches[1]; Write-Host ''; Write-Host \"=== SAVES — Phase $phase ===\" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $phasePattern = \"(?s)## Phase $phase.*?(?=## Phase $($phase+1)|$)\"; if ($content -match $phasePattern) { $phaseSection = $matches[0]; $items = $phaseSection -split \"`n\" | Where-Object { $_ -match '^\s*-\s*\[' }; if ($items) { $items | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ($_ -replace '^\s+', '  ') } } }; Write-Host '' }"
